center.name: 溫博伊島
center.summary: 溫博伊島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Ashy myzomela，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |date=1976 |title=Birds of the Plesyumi Area, Central New Britain |url=https://www.jstor.org/stable/1367698 |journal=The Condor |volume=78 |issue=3 |pages=370–374 |doi=10.2307/1367698 |jstor=1367698 |issn=0010-5422|url-access=subscription }} It is found in New Britain and Umboi Island in Papua New Guinea.{{Cite book |last=Steadman |first=David W
